data.title: US Bitcoin ETFs see $1.2 Billion in weekly outflows
data.description:
US spot Bitcoin ETFs faced $1. 2B in weekly outflows as Bitcoin fell to a four-month low. BlackRock, Fidelity, and Grayscale saw major redemptions amid Bitcoin’s 10% weekly drop. Schwab says crypto interest is rising, with clients holding 20% of US crypto ETPs
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/us-bitcoin-etfs-see-1-2-billion-in-weekly-outflows/

data.title: CZ Warns BNB Treasury Firms: Use Custodians or Lose Investment Access
data.description:
CZ, the co-founder and CEO of Binance, has issued a warning to firms managing BNB treasury funds, emphasizing the critical importance of employing secure custodial services. He stated that failure to utilize reputable custodians for their treasury management could result in a loss of access to investment opportunities and essential resources on the Binance platform. This cautionary message highlights the importance of safeguarding digital assets and ensuring compliance with industry standards to maintain operational integrity and trust in the cryptocurrency ecosystem.
source: https://blocknews.com/cz-warns-bnb-treasury-firms-use-custodians-or-lose-investment-access/

data.title: Avid crypto traders reset Bitcoin trade to its 4-year cycle rulebook to account for recent decline
data.description:
Bitcoin traders are reviving the traditional four-year cycle rulebook amid renewed price declines and growing market uncertainty.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/traders-reset-bitcoin-4-year-cycle-rulebook/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 107,000 USDT with a 2.92% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 18, 2025, 10:32 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 107,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 107,027.390625 USDT, with a narrowed 2.92% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Cardano Price Faces Pressure, But Signs Hint at a Possible Rebound
data.description:
The price of Cardano is currently experiencing significant downward pressure, as various market factors and investor sentiment contribute to its volatility. However, despite these challenges, there are emerging indicators and signs that suggest a potential rebound might be on the horizon, offering hope to investors looking for a turnaround in the cryptocurrency's value.
source: https://blocknews.com/cardano-price-faces-pressure-but-signs-hint-at-a-possible-rebound/

data.title: HMRC intensifies crackdown on unpaid crypto taxes
data.description:
HMRC sent nearly 65,000 warning letters to crypto investors in 2024–2025, more than double last year’s total.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hmrc-intensifies-crackdown-on-crypto-taxes/

data.title: The Chairman of the U.S. SEC: The United States has lagged behind in the field of encryption for ten years, and establishing a regulatory framework is a top priority.
data.description: Paul Atkins, Chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), stated at an event in Washington, D.C., that the United States is "probably about a decade behind" in the crypto space and that establishing a robust regulatory framework to attract innovators back and promote industry development has become a top priority. Atkins noted that the SEC's goal is to "build a robust system that allows innovation to flourish" and ensure that the United States regains its position as the center of the crypto space. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Aster Updates Stage 3 Trading Points Rules: Both spot and perpetual contract trading volume are included, and fraudulent activities such as wash trading are strictly prohibited
data.description: Aster, the perpetual swaps DEX, has announced an update to its Stage 3 trading points calculation rules on the X platform. Trading points will now be calculated based on factors including, but not limited to, transaction fee contributions and liquidity (market maker orders). Both spot and perpetual swaps trading volume will be included, and points will be updated hourly based on total fees incurred. Aster strictly prohibits any abusive trading behavior, including but not limited to wash trading, market manipulation, or other fraudulent activities. Aster reserves the right to adjust, freeze, or revoke Rh points at its sole discretion if such activity is detected in an account.

data.title: Market Recovery Possible After Leverage Cleanup, Analyst Suggests
data.description: According to BlockBeats, CryptoQuant analyst Axel Adler Jr has indicated that the market remains in a correction phase following a significant leverage cleanup. The risk of cascading liquidations has decreased from peak levels. While a short-term rebound is possible, a sustainable reversal would require synchronized growth between prices and open interest, or a noticeable influx of spot capital.

data.title: The new wallet withdrew 744,000 LINK from Binance two hours ago, worth $12.44 million
data.description: According to monitoring by crypto analyst Ember @EmberCN, a new wallet created just two hours ago withdrew 744,000 LINK from Binance, worth approximately US$12.44 million, with an average withdrawal price of approximately US$16.7.

data.title: Strike CEO sees Bitcoin signaling trouble as U.S. banks struggle
data.description:
Jack Mallers says Bitcoin may outperform every other currency if the government chooses to print money.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-signaling-trouble/

data.title: SEC Chair Highlights U.S. Lag in Cryptocurrency Regulation
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, during an event in Washington, D.C., U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chair Paul Atkins expressed concerns that the United States is approximately a decade behind in the cryptocurrency sector. Addressing this issue is a top priority for regulators.

Atkins emphasized that the SEC is focused on creating a robust framework to encourage those who may have left the U.S. to return. The agency aims for this framework to foster innovation within the country.

data.title: Trump's second son: I have never discussed cryptocurrency with my father, but I firmly believe that blockchain is the future of finance
data.description: On October 18th, Trump's second son, Eric Trump, stated in a CNN interview that he "never discussed cryptocurrency with his father," but acknowledged his father as a staunch supporter of the industry. Eric stated that the crypto industry broadly supported Trump during the campaign, and that Trump also believed blockchain represented the future of finance. He stated, "Everything can be done better, faster, and cheaper with blockchain. If we ignore it, America will be left behind."

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs shed $1.2 billion amid drop in BTC price
data.description:
US spot Bitcoin ETFs registered more than $1. 2 billion in outflows to end this week. The eleven spot BTC ETFs saw a total outflow of $366 million on Friday.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-etfs-shed-1-2-billion-drop-btc-price/
